evidence.display: The pt is an 80M with multiple medical problems including prostate ca    with me
evidence.text: The pt is an 80M with multiple medical problems including prostate ca    with mets to the spine.

evidence.display: He recently was admitted for a ventral hernia    repair and was eventually disch
evidence.text: He recently was admitted for a ventral hernia    repair and was eventually discharged to HRC.

evidence.display: On [**9-28**] the pt presented    from rehab with fevers, hypotension, and an al
evidence.text: On [**9-28**] the pt presented    from rehab with fevers, hypotension, and an altered mental status all    c/w sepsis due to MRSA bacteremia.

evidence.display: His course in the MICU has been    complicated by persistent fevers and hypoxemi
evidence.text: His course in the MICU has been    complicated by persistent fevers and hypoxemia as well as an impaired    mental status.

evidence.display: Fever, unknown origin (FUO, Hyperthermia, Pyrexia)    Assessment:    Temp to 100
evidence.text: Fever, unknown origin (FUO, Hyperthermia, Pyrexia)    Assessment:    Temp to 100.7    Action:    MD aware, PRN Tylenol given, legionella urinary antigen sample sent,    obtained sputum spec via NTS.

evidence.display: Response:    Temp down to 100 however on the rise again.
evidence.text: Response:    Temp down to 100 however on the rise again.

evidence.display: Plan:    Monitor temp curve, continue IV ABX, needs vanco level sent in AM.
evidence.text: Plan:    Monitor temp curve, continue IV ABX, needs vanco level sent in AM.

evidence.display: Altered mental status (not Delirium)    Assessment:    Minimal verbal communicat
evidence.text: Altered mental status (not Delirium)    Assessment:    Minimal verbal communication, occasionally will nod to questions, not    following commands, oriented to self only.

evidence.display: Action:    Mental status assessed frequently, daughter in to visit this afternoo
evidence.text: Action:    Mental status assessed frequently, daughter in to visit this afternoon,    daughter states she does understand some of what pt is saying, claims    pt knows where he is.

evidence.display: Response:    At times able to understand pt s garbled speech although still not
evidence.text: Response:    At times able to understand pt s garbled speech although still not    following commands.

evidence.display: Plan:    Continue to assess mental status, orient as needed.
evidence.text: Plan:    Continue to assess mental status, orient as needed.

evidence.display: Hypoxemia    Assessment:    Pt on high flow neb at 50%.
evidence.text: Hypoxemia    Assessment:    Pt on high flow neb at 50%.

evidence.display: Response:    Pt tolerating well, sats >95%, lungs clear, pt denies difficulty
evidence.text: Response:    Pt tolerating well, sats >95%, lungs clear, pt denies difficulty    breathing/SOB    Plan:    Continue to wean O2 as tolerated by pt.

evidence.display: Hypotension (not Shock)    Assessment:    Pt on Levophed 0.03mcg/kg/min.
evidence.text: Hypotension (not Shock)    Assessment:    Pt on Levophed 0.03mcg/kg/min.

evidence.display: CVP 6-11    Action:    Weaned to 0.02mcg/kg/min, then to off.
evidence.text: CVP 6-11    Action:    Weaned to 0.02mcg/kg/min, then to off.

evidence.display: Response:    Pt maintain acceptable BP 90s to 120s, MAPs >50.
evidence.text: Response:    Pt maintain acceptable BP 90s to 120s, MAPs >50.

evidence.display: Plan:    Continue to monitor SBP/CVP, pressors remain at bedside if needed.
evidence.text: Plan:    Continue to monitor SBP/CVP, pressors remain at bedside if needed.
